excerpt: Navigating the world of dog treats can be tricky, especially for pups with sensitive stomachs. Discover how Brutus & Barnaby's natural dog chews, like our delicious Sweet Potato Fries, can be a safe and tasty option for your furry friend.
page_title: Natural Dog Chews for Sensitive Stomachs | Brutus & Barnaby
meta_description: Find the perfect natural dog chews for your sensitive stomach pup! Brutus & Barnaby offers wholesome, limited-ingredient treats like Sweet Potato Fries that are gentle and delicious.
